projects.title: SKycast - a Weather Application
projects.description: Skycast is a polished weather web app that gives you instant, beautiful weather data for any city on Earth. No clutter, no noise just clean, clear conditions at a glance.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my skills, projects, and experience. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.title: Blog Platform
projects.description: A blogging platform where users can create, read, update, and delete posts. Built with Vue.js and Firebase.

projects.title: Snip - Url Shortener
projects.description: A url shortener application that shortens the url and provides a shortened and customizable link to the user. It also provides analytics for the shortened links.

projects.title: 45+ Repositories
